description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 8 (Sunday), I attended the opening ceremony of the "Hanno Rotary Club Cup 36th Seseragi Cup Middle School Table Tennis Tournament" held at Hanno Citizens' Sports Hall Main Arena.

This tournament brings together middle school table tennis teams from Hanno City, as well as from throughout Saitama Prefecture and the Kanto region, providing an opportunity for students to demonstrate the results of their regular practice.

I would like to express my gratitude to all those involved who worked hard to make this tournament possible.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13119.html
summary: 📝 Mayor's remarks: 36th Hanno Rotary Club Cup Seseragi Cup Middle School Table Tennis Tournament
